prompt: A dark fantasy illustration of a single floating woman centered in the frame, shown as a near-black silhouette against an intense glowing crimson background. She hovers a little above a reflective black-red water surface, barefoot, with both arms relaxed and slightly extended downward, fingers softly spread, her posture calm but powerful. Her very long {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair streams dramatically to the left in wild windblown tendrils, and her gown is a shredded, smoky, semi-translucent {argument name="dress color" default="black"} dress with layered ribbons and torn fabric trailing downward into shadowy wisps. Behind her is one enormous ornate circular magic sigil, perfectly framing her body like a halo, rendered in intricate gothic filigree, concentric rings, and arcane lace-like geometry, glowing bright blood red with a hot white-red core. The entire scene is dominated by a black and deep red palette, with swirling smoke, embers, and magical energy filling the air. At the lower left and lower right edges are 2 clusters of sharp red crystals emerging from darkness. The bottom of the image shows one glossy reflective pool with rippling crimson highlights mirroring the light above. Make the atmosphere infernal, mystical, and regal, as if {argument name="character role" default="a dark sorceress"} is awakening in a forbidden ritual chamber. High contrast, cinematic backlighting, volumetric glow, ultra-detailed digital painting, vertical composition, centered symmetrical framing, ominous elegance, no text, no extra characters, no visible facial details.
translatedPrompt: 一张暗黑奇幻风格的插画，画面中央是一位悬浮的女性，以近乎全黑的剪影形式呈现，背景是强烈发光的深红色。她赤脚悬浮在反光的黑红色水面上方，双臂放松并微微向下伸展，手指轻柔张开，姿态沉稳而有力。她极长的 {argument name="hair color" default="black"} 头发在狂风中向左飘散，形成狂野的丝缕；她身穿一件破损、烟雾缭绕且半透明的 {argument name="dress color" default="black"} 礼服，层叠的丝带和撕裂的布料向下拖曳，融入阴影的薄雾中。她身后是一个巨大的华丽圆形魔法符文，如同光环般完美地勾勒出她的身体，符文由复杂的哥特式花丝、同心圆和奥术蕾丝般的几何图形构成，散发着明亮的血红色光芒，核心呈现出炽热的白红色。整个场景以黑色和深红色为主调，空气中弥漫着缭绕的烟雾、余烬和魔法能量。左下角和右下角各有 2 簇从黑暗中显现的尖锐红色水晶。画面底部是一个光亮的反光水池，倒映着上方红色的涟漪光影。营造出一种地狱般、神秘且庄严的氛围，仿佛 {argument name="character role" default="a dark sorceress"} 正在禁忌的仪式密室中觉醒。高对比度、电影级背光、体积光、超精细数字绘画、竖构图、居中对称构图、阴郁优雅，无文字，无额外角色，无可见面部细节。

breakdown.creativeCore: 深红暗黑女巫仪式：此提示词可生成一张极具戏剧性的暗黑奇幻风格角色海报，画面中一位女巫悬浮在发光的红色魔法阵前，呈现出剪影效果，非常适合用于哥特式概念艺术或电影封面图像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight, volumetric, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
禁止额外文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
